title: PIOFLI-PVP
description: Kinda ok pvp modpack with few mods and good texturepack
body:
## HII~ 
 welcome to **PIOFLI-PVP 1.21.4**
 
 kinda ok pvp modpack 



<details>
<summary>Mod list</summary>

🚀 Optimization & Performance

Sodium

Dynamic FPS
           
BadOptimizations

**~~--------------------------------------------~~**

🎨 Visuals & HUD

AppleSkin – better hunger & saturation display

Better Ping Display – shows ping next to names

BetterHurtCam – less annoying hurt camera effect

BetterShields – clearer shield visuals

Clear Water/Lava/PowderSnow – transparent fluids & snow

Show Durability – quick durability preview for items

TierTagger – player tiers from [MCTIERS](https://mctiers.com/rankings/overall)

Zoomify – smooth zoom


**~~--------------------------------------------~~**

⚔️ PvP & Gameplay

Soup API (PvP visuals) – extra PvP-oriented visual features

Particle Blocker – removes distracting particles during fights

TotemCounter – counts used totems

Marlow's Crystal Optimizer – optimizes end crystals 

**~~--------------------------------------------~~**

🛠️ Tools & Utility

Drippy Loading Screen – stylish loading screen

No Chat Reports – no chat report on servers

FancyMenu – customizable menu

ItemLocks – prevents throwing/dropping items

In-Game Account Switcher – swap accounts without restarting

Essential Mod – makes playing with friends easier

Mod Menu – manage mods easily in-game

**~~--------------------------------------------~~**


🧩 APIs & Libraries (required for the pack)

Fabric API

Fabric Language Kotlin

Cloth Config API

owo-lib

Konkrete

Melody

Soup API

Text Placeholder API

ukulib

YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL)

Architectury API


</details>


```
you can contact me on dc : pioflickiv2
```


```
i do not claim that any mod in mod pack are created by me , all credit for mods go to original creator/creators
```
